channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Desrosiers scores 3 TDs as Memphis tops No. 18 Tulane 34-24 to end the Green Wave's faint CFP hopes
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — When three deep passes by Darian Mensah resulted in turnovers, Tulane's long-shot hopes of sneaking into the College Football Playoff slipped away. Greg Desrosiers Jr. caught two scoring passes and ran for a touchdown, and Memphis defeated No.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Packers take advantage of frigid home-field elements in win against Dolphins
item.description: The Green Bay Packers took advantage of the elements at Lambeau Field against the Miami Dolphins to finish off the Thanksgiving tripleheader.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Overshown's flashy pick-6 boosts Cowboys in 27-20 Thanksgiving win over Giants
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — DeMarvion Overshown wasn't sure he could run down the pass he tipped and turn it into an interception for a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Golfer who competed against trans Hailey Davidson 'praying' for LPGA gender rule changes
item.description: A female golfer who competed against trans player Hailey Davidson is "praying" for the LPGA to change its rule on gender identity in competition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Battle, former Tennessee coach and Alabama AD who founded licensing company, dies
item.description: Bill Battle III, who was athletic director at his alma mater, Alabama, where he played for Paul “Bear” Bryant’s first national championship team, coached the Tennessee Volunteers and also founded the Collegiate Licensing Company, has died.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NHL goalie inexplicably puts lead goal in own net
item.description: Washington Capitals goalie Charlie Lindgren had an all-time blunder on Wednesday night, scoring a goal into his own net while trying to make a pass.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Jose State is disappointed Boise State forfeited but looks forward to volleyball final
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State said Thursday it was disappointed Boise State forfeited its semifinal match in the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament but that the Spartans were focused on the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Blake Snell and Dodgers agree to $182 million, 5-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Less than a month after winning the World Series, the Los Angeles Dodgers are spending big again to add one of baseball's best pitchers to their star-studded roster.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Padres launch holiday ticket sale for 2025 season, but not for long
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) -- For a limited time only, San Diego Padres fans can score single-game tickets for the 2025 season. On Thursday, the team launched its holiday sale, which will last until midnight on Friday, Dec. 6.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds ruling to allow SJSU women's volleyball team member to play
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender. The 10th U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Formula 1 expands grid to add General Motors' Cadillac brand and new American team for 2026 season
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Formula 1 on Monday at last said it will expand its grid in 2026 to make room for an American team that is partnered with General Motors. “As the pinnacle of motorsports, F1 demands boundary-pushing innovation and excellence.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets look for coach, GM amid chaos
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – With the Jets’ season completely off the rails, it wasn't a big surprise when General Manager Joe Douglas was fired this week. Changes need to be made, and Douglas was carrying around a 30-64 record over five-plus seasons.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5
